description: A news segment requires anonymizing a subject. Using the animation scene '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz', apply a 'Mosaic' or 'Pixelate' effect to the character animation column to obscure visual details while maintaining visible motion. Render at least 10 frames of the censored animation as a PNG sequence to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/mosaic_censor/'.
